name: buildwithclaude
description: Build with Claude is a plugin marketplace and discovery hub for Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and the Agent SDK. It catalogs curated agents, slash commands, hooks, skills, and plugin packages alongside community-discovered resources including 20,000+ community plugins, 4,500+ MCP servers, and 1,100+ plugin marketplaces. Provides a web UI at buildwithclaude.com and integrates as a Claude Code plugin marketplace.

findings_summary.notes: Active individual project with strong documentation including README, CONTRIBUTING.md, UPDATES.md, and screenshot assets. MIT licensed. Has mcp-servers.json curating Docker-based MCP servers from the official Docker MCP registry. Also includes a .claude-plugin directory, Dockerfile, and package.json indicating a deployable skill/plugin. No SECURITY.md found - primary gap for this score tier. The repo is a discovery/cataloging tool rather than an execution engine, limiting risk surface. Individual owner rather than an organization, but maintained with recent commits as of verification date.
